prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your arduino programming forward
items: Research and purchase an Arduino starter kit with essential components for your first project
Select and order specific sensors for your first Arduino project idea
Create a detailed inventory list of all components in your Arduino kit and organize them in labeled storage containers
Test your breadboard and jumper wires to ensure reliable connections before starting your first project
Compare and select the appropriate Arduino board model for your specific project requirements
Source and purchase quality connecting cables and power supplies for reliable Arduino operation
